data.content:
This is an NUnit project on VSTest. Use the `--filter` option with `FullyQualifiedName` to target the class:

```bash
dotnet test --filter "FullyQualifiedName~Contoso.Reports.Tests.ReportExporterTests"
```

The `~` operator means "contains", so this matches all tests in the `ReportExporterTests` class while excluding `ReportGeneratorTests`.
